title: Heroes of Might and Magic 3
description: Mod inspired by the legendary game Heroes of Might and Magic III! This mod brings iconic elements and atmosphere of the classic strategy game to the cubic world of Minecraft.
body:
### **Trailer**
https://youtu.be/EeCzBuLyE8k?si=-AbahXGxVg_jSAcE

### **Description**

Welcome to the world of Minecraft, inspired by the legendary game _Heroes of Might and Magic III_! This mod brings the iconic elements and atmosphere of the classic strategy game into the cubic world of Minecraft. The goal of the mod is not only to unite these two games but to stay as true to Minecraft's vanilla style as possible while faithfully recreating the mechanics of Heroes III.

About **25 structures** of different factions, more than **50 artifacts** and items directly from the game Heroes 3 were added to the modification. 
![Armor](https://i.postimg.cc/xdMZWZ6t/armorhelmandchest.png)

![Artifacts](https://i.postimg.cc/GmZB3bDP/artifacts.png)


And about **40 entities** also from the game Heroes 3 (sounds, health, damage, speed).

![Creatures](https://i.postimg.cc/fyTgSRDr/creatureshomm3.png)

Every addition enriches the game with depth and strategy: skill progression, the search for rare artifacts, mastering spells, and exploring new structures. This mod is more than just an add-on for Minecraft — it’s a chance to experience the spirit of Heroes III in a new format. Dive into a world of adventure, magic, and tactics, where every step can mark the beginning of a new story!

There are no limits to your magic limit, because spells directly depend on your parameters, which can be improved with the help of artifacts or experience.

![Magic Book](https://i.postimg.cc/kGSPwy2b/magicbook1.png)

Also, for interest, about 20 achievements of varying difficulty were added.

 

This modification also has a storyline that can be completed by the Archmage.

![Lore by Archmage](https://i.postimg.cc/G2j5pywD/storylinehomm3.png)

A separate map for playing with friends (2-4 players) "LuckyTest" was also created, where you can test your luck in a battle with friends.  (https://youtu.be/clS9x2iUG90?si=ihgxpnlfVir9Bg2h)

 

More details about all the details of the modification are written on the wiki:

Ru : https://homm3-minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/HoMM_3_-_Minecraft_Wiki

Eng : https://homm-3-minecraft-eng.fandom.com/wiki/HoMM_3_-_Minecraft_Wiki

CurseForge : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/heroes-of-might-and-magic-3](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/heroes-of-might-and-magic-3)
